body.title: Granny: cascading tier pickup for idle master devices
body.result: cascade_if_idle flag + _cascade_active_workers() + cascade pickup in run_once; worker field updated post-dispatch; 10/10 tests pass
body.intention: I intend that a master device (CC.0) automatically absorbs creator/builder tickets when its own tier queue is empty, so idle capacity is never wasted.
body.description:
Add `cascade_if_idle: true` per-device flag to granny.yaml. When set, Granny widens the role filter for that device after confirming zero tickets at its own tier. Order: master → creator → builder. Granny re-checks each tick; cascade only applies when the device's own-tier queue is genuinely empty.

**Affected files:** devices/granny/daemon.py, config/granny.yaml
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** IN — cascade flag, widened role filter in run_once. OUT — exact-match mode (separate ticket), escalation tier-bump logic (consequence of escalation redesign).
**Completion criteria:** When CC.0 has no master-role tickets and cascade_if_idle=true, Granny dispatches a builder-role ticket to CC.0; log shows 'cascade pickup' label. Test: unit test in tests/granny/ with a mock queue.
